name: whatsapp-ai-monorepo
description: Monorepo for WhatsApp AI Bot with Mistral integration

scripts.build: echo 'Building all packages...' && npm run build:packages
scripts.build:packages: cd packages/core && npm run build && cd ../../packages/config && npm run build && cd ../../packages/mistral-sdk && npm run build && cd ../../apps/whatsapp-bot && npm run build
